title: Dark Smoked Irish Cookies
description: Rich, briny, and molten, these cookies are a romantic Irish treat, featuring a low-glycemic friendly twist, smoked to perfection on a cedar plank.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the almond flour, coconut sugar, and smoked sea salt.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the melted butter, eggs, and vanilla extract.
Combine the wet and dry ingredients and stir until a dough forms.
Fold in the dark chocolate chips.
Scoop the dough into balls, about 1 inch in diameter.
Place the balls onto the soaked cedar planks, leaving about 2 inches of space between each cookie.
Smoke the cookies on the cedar planks in the oven for 10 minutes, or until lightly browned.
Remove the cookies from the oven and let cool on the planks for 5 minutes.
Transfer the cookies to a wire rack to cool completely.
